summary: CLAUDE.md rule changes mid-session have no effect - they only load at session start
problem: You edit CLAUDE.md to add a new rule or constraint, then continue working in the same session expecting the agent to follow it immediately
solution: After editing CLAUDE.md, start a new session for the changes to take effect. In the current session, state the new rule explicitly in the chat if you need it followed right now
root_cause: CLAUDE.md is read once when the session initializes and injected into the system prompt. It is not re-read on each turn; mid-session edits are invisible to the running context
